mapper.sql: id, student_user_id, counselor_user_id, status, topic, hidden, hidden_reason, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM consult_thread WHERE student_user_id = #{studentUserId} ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT FROM consult_thread ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consult_thread (student_user_id, counselor_user_id, status, topic, hidden, hidden_reason) VALUES (#{studentUserId}, #{counselorUserId}, #{status}, #{topic}, #{hidden}, #{hiddenReason})
